items.title: S01E01 - The Day Garry Moved In
items.summary: Comic Garry Shandling moves into Vanna White's former condominium, has his furniture stolen and makes a date with a beautiful cable installer.

infolabels.title: The Day Garry Moved In
infolabels.plot: Comic Garry Shandling moves into Vanna White's former condominium, has his furniture stolen and makes a date with a beautiful cable installer.

items.title: S01E03 - Garry Throws a Surprise Party
items.summary: Garry throws a surprise birthday party for his mother that gives her a heart attack, so he seeks solace from Father Guido Sarducci.

infolabels.plot: Garry throws a surprise birthday party for his mother that gives her a heart attack, so he seeks solace from Father Guido Sarducci.
